conservative.name: One Foot in the Grave
conservative.requirements: Play in response to an ally dying within medium range

success.description: You invoke the blessing and lose all your favour
You invoke the blessing (and your current favour is unaffected)

delay.description: Effect: Play when an ally within medium range dies. He does not die, instead. While the spell is recharging, he is alive and cannot be killed or KO'd by damage or injury. When the spell recharges, he dies. This spell does not recharge following normal rules; instead, remove 1 recharge token from it each time the target rolls ,, or
